title: Solid Foundations
description: Targeted lower body work with sumo squats, Bulgarian split squats and dynamic plank

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet very wide, toes pointed out

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squats
exercises.instructions: Back foot on a chair, lower the knee

exercises.name: Floor hip thrust
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, feet flat, lift hips, squeeze glutes

exercises.name: Good morning
exercises.instructions: Hands behind the head, lean torso forward keeping the back straight

exercises.name: V-ups
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift arms and legs to touch the feet

exercises.name: Forearm plank
exercises.instructions: On forearms, body perfectly aligned, brace the abs

exercises.name: Russian twists
exercises.instructions: Seated, feet off the floor, twist torso left to right

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
